headline: Five Irish Tourist Gems Banned Israeli Minister Itamar Ben-Gvir Will Be Raging To Miss
excerpt: BANNED from traveling to Ireland at a time Israeli goods and services with direct link to the occupied territories remain more than welcome, Itamar Ben-Gvir will be kicking himself that his genocidal zeal has cost him the chance to visit some of Ireland’s most treasured tourist experiences, such as: The Butter Museum. A museum, dedicated to butter, for a man who looks like his arteries are clogged up with hate, it’s a tragedy knowing that a butter laced sandwich from the Cork museum could have be the decisive straw that broke the bigot’s heart. O’Connell Street. It could be extended […]

headline: We Are OBSESSED With Dua Lipa’s Leash Boy

headline: “I Asked ChatGPT If It Was Okay To Drive” Drink Drive TD Highlights Dangers Of AI
excerpt: FIANNA FÁIL TD Malcolm Byrne has said he will never trust ChatGPT again after he was arrested on suspicion of drink driving last Thursday. Byrne, the now-former Chair of the Joint Oireachtas Committee on Artificial Intelligence, is understood to have driven from his hotel in Dublin to Dublin Airport after asking ChatGPT if it was okay to drive, before being stopped at a mandatory Garda checkpoint in the city centre. “When he pulled ChatGPT up on it, all he got was an apology,” a source close to Byrne revealed, stating the TD was furious at himself for relying on AI […]

headline: Poll: How Should The Healy-Rae Brothers Settle Their Differences?
excerpt: AFTER AN explosive radio interview in which Michael Healy-Rae attributed the behaviour of his brother Danny for his downfall in government and subsequent resignation. Is there anyway back for these brothers who will continue to campaign together in Kerry no matter what? Will any of these solutions puncture the tension and allow them to hash it out and end their apparent estrangement?

headline: Local Woman Can’t Believe How Talented Child Who Made Her Shein Dress Must Be
excerpt: A LOCAL woman who has just received a delivery of the €8 dress she ordered from Chinese manufacturer Shein has expressed her admiration for the craftsmanship of the child who made it. “It’s class,” confirmed Limerick woman Andrea Mangan as she admired the dress, the dopamine hit from receiving something in the post still coursing through her brain. “I thought it’d be a sort of throwaway, one and done use for the hen I’ve to go to next week but wow, the stitching is faultless. You can tell the kid really is gifted on the sewing machine,” added Mangan, who […]

headline: God Admits Biggest Regret Was Sending Prophets With Wildly Conflicting Ideals To Earth
excerpt: In a rare and exclusive interview with mortals, God, the Almighty Father and creator of the entire universe, has finally broken his silence on his biggest regrets and also offered a brief, if cryptic, glimpse into the future of mankind over the next millennium. “I suppose I should start with a humble apology,” began the 15-billion-year-old deity, rubbing his temple in frustration, clearly dreading the hindsight he was about to unleash. “I’ve been a terrible father,” he sighed, holding up a hand to stop this reporter’s interruption. “No, I know what you’re going to say – and thanks for trying […]

headline: New Range Of Fartless Cattle Launched To Cut CO2 Emissions
excerpt: A NEW range of cattle genetically incapable of emitting gas has been launched as part of a sweeping EU directive aimed at reducing agricultural carbon emissions, WWN has learned. Developed over a decade and approved by Brussels last month, the new breed has a maximum lifespan of three years, after which slaughter is required due to dangerously high internal gas accumulation. The cattle have been engineered with a modified digestive system that traps wind from all four of their stomachs and stores it in a specially developed internal gas sack, which gradually inflates over the animal’s lifetime. “Basically they’ll explode […]

headline: Nation Split On Whether Person Should Die For Shoplifting
excerpt: THE QUESTION of whether a person should die for shoplifting has divided Ireland this week, with opinion split broadly along the lines of people who have a good grasp of the law and people who don’t particularly care for it when it comes to a certain tone of skin colour. headline: This Man Stopped Walking Head First Into Clear Glass Doors With This One Simple Trick
excerpt: SETTING ‘walking into clear glass doors’ records in the last 12 months, one Irish man has finally figured out a genius hack to avoiding mild-to-heavy concussion and is ready to share that hack with the world. “I was maybe on an average of one-a-week when it came to smashing my face, far from ideal,” explains 32-year-old Ryan O’Dea to WWN, whose face has at this point taken more punishment than Tyson Fury’s punchbag. Failing to see pristine and clean glass doors for what they were had become so routine for O’Dea he was no longer embarrassed if there were witnesses, […]
